package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_io_operations_readall_on_known_large_file: Layer: I/O operations. Flag os.ReadFile or io.ReadAll on files that are processed sequentially.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule549PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario549Positive(records []Rule549PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
